title: Segfault in hierarchy
body:
I found this while hacking on `synth_gowin`. 

## Steps to reproduce the issue

Using [hierarchy-bug.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4406043/hierarchy-bug.tar.gz) run `yosys -p "hierarchy" hierarchy-bug.il`.

## Expected behavior

`hierarchy` completes successfully.

## Actual behavior

Yosys segfaults; gdb points to a possible infinite loop in the backtrace.

```
#0  0x000000000057f1ad in Yosys::RTLIL::Design::module (this=<optimized out>, name=...) at kernel/rtlil.cc:423
#1  0x0000000000ae395f in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:508
#2  0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#3  0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#4  0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509

    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#7  0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#8  0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#9  0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#10 0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#11 0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#12 0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#13 0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
#14 0x0000000000ae397b in (anonymous namespace)::set_keep_assert (cache=std::map with 0 elements, mod=<optimized out>)
    at passes/hierarchy/hierarchy.cc:509
```
